summary: 31 tests passed, 99.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: File-path hint ["app/api/users.py"] on the fastapi-python template selects templates/api/router.py.template.
completion_promises.evidence: Test test_file_path_hint_selects_matching_subdir creates a fastapi-python template tree with api/router.py.template and verifies that file_path_hints=['app/api/users.py'] selects it. The select_patterns function extracts 'api' from the path segments and matches it against the api/ subdirectory, returning router.py.template. Test passes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Empty file-path hints + tech_stack="Python" falls back to tech-stack path; empty still -> alphabetical-3.
completion_promises.evidence: Three tests cover this: test_empty_hints_tech_stack_fallback (empty hints + Python tech_stack selects via _TECH_STACK_SUBDIR_MAP), test_empty_hints_empty_tech_stack_alphabetical_fallback (empty hints + empty tech_stack returns first 3 alphabetically), and test_no_matching_tech_stack_falls_through_to_alphabetical (unmatched tech_stack 'Haskell' returns first 3 alphabetically). All pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Hard cap: never returns more than 5 files regardless of matches.
completion_promises.evidence: test_hard_cap_default_five provides 7 file-path hints matching many subdirs and asserts len(result.selected_files) <= 5. test_hard_cap_custom tests max_files=2 and asserts <= 2. Both pass. Implementation truncates candidates to max_files before token budget check.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Token cap: measured oversize files are skipped with a warning recorded.
completion_promises.evidence: test_token_cap_skips_oversize_files sets max_tokens=15 and verifies warnings contain skip/token messages. test_token_cap_stops_adding_files sets max_tokens=20 and verifies fewer files selected than without cap. Implementation uses _estimate_tokens (len(content)//4) and records skip warnings. Both pass.

test_does_not_mutate_available_files captures original available_files before calling select_patterns and asserts equality after. test_returns_new_context_without_mutating_input verifies input ctx.selected_files stays empty while result has selected files. Implementation makes defensive copies via list(). Both pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: Both guardkit/knowledge/template_pattern_loader.py and tests/unit/test_template_pattern_loader.py compile successfully via python -m py_compile with zero errors. Code follows PEP 8, uses type hints, docstrings, and follows existing module conventions.
